tests.scenario: Start a meditation session without crashing
steps: Open the meditation app
Select any available meditation session
Press play
tests.expected_result: The selected meditation session starts successfully and the app does not crash.
tests.notes: Revised from the automated stability test to match the narrower hybrid requirement for session startup.

tests.scenario: Maintain uninterrupted audio playback during a session
steps: Open the meditation app
Start a meditation session
Allow the session to continue playing for its intended duration without pressing pause or stop
tests.expected_result: Audio continues playing for the session unless the user intentionally interrupts playback.
tests.notes: Added to directly test the hybrid requirement about unexpected audio stoppage.

tests.scenario: Browse available guided meditations and courses
steps: Open the meditation app
Navigate to the main content browsing area
Review the available listed content
tests.expected_result: The app displays a browsable library containing guided meditations or courses that the user can select.
tests.notes: Rewritten from the vague automated content variety test to focus on direct accessibility of content.

tests.scenario: Verify content items are clearly labeled
steps: Open the meditation app
Go to a screen showing multiple content items
Inspect the labels or titles shown for each item
tests.expected_result: Each selectable content item has a clear title or label that distinguishes it from other items.
tests.notes: Added to support the hybrid requirement on clear content identification.

tests.scenario: Access core meditation content before payment or donation
steps: Install and open the app as a first time user
Proceed through any initial onboarding screens
Attempt to open and play available meditation content without making a payment or donation
tests.expected_result: The user can access and play at least one meditation session before being required to pay or donate.
tests.notes: Revised from the automated free access test to match the hybrid requirement for trial access.

tests.scenario: Check clarity of payment or donation prompts
steps: Open the app and navigate to a point where a payment or donation prompt is displayed
Read the prompt text and available action buttons
Determine whether the prompt indicates if payment is optional or required
tests.expected_result: The payment or donation prompt clearly states whether the user can skip it and continue using available content.
tests.notes: Added to make donation and paywall messaging testable.

tests.scenario: Dismiss an optional payment prompt and continue using free content
steps: Open the app as a user who has not paid or donated
Dismiss an optional payment or donation prompt
Attempt to access content that is designated as free or trial content
tests.expected_result: After dismissing the optional prompt, the user can still access content that is meant to remain free or available for trial.
tests.notes: Added to verify that optional prompts do not incorrectly block previously available content.

tests.scenario: Begin a session within three navigation actions from home
steps: Open the app to the home screen
Count the user actions needed to reach a playable meditation session
Start the selected session
tests.expected_result: The user can begin a meditation session within three actions from the home screen, excluding playback time.
tests.notes: Rewritten from the vague habit building test into a measurable routine support test.

tests.scenario: View a completed meditation session in activity history
steps: Open the app
Complete a meditation session
Open the session history or activity record
tests.expected_result: The completed meditation session appears in a user visible history or equivalent record.
tests.notes: Revised to support habit building through visible completed activity rather than unsupported reminder features.

tests.scenario: Navigate between home, content browsing, and playback screens
steps: Open the app on the home screen
Navigate to the content browsing screen
Open a meditation session and then return to the previous screen
tests.expected_result: Each screen transition works correctly and the user can return from playback to the previous screen without a broken navigation path.
tests.notes: Rewritten from the broad ease of use test to focus on navigation flow.

tests.scenario: Verify primary controls are visible on relevant screens
steps: Open a meditation playback screen
Check for visible play or pause controls and back navigation
Open a content screen and inspect the available primary actions
tests.expected_result: Relevant primary controls such as play, pause, and back navigation are visible on the appropriate screens.
tests.notes: Added to directly test discoverability of core controls.

steps: Open the app
Visit major navigation and content screens
Inspect menu items, buttons, and major section labels
tests.expected_result: Key interface labels are present and readable on major navigation and content screens.
tests.notes: Added to make usability and label clarity testable.
